title: Eternal Echoes: The Sacred Sounds Through the Mystic
author: Sadhguru
description: ‘Eternal Echoes’ is an anthology of poems penned by Sadhguru. Expertly expressing love, devotion, longing, struggle, seeking and bliss – Sadhguru’s poems are a true portrayal of the many facets of the master. Each poem is illustrated by a carefully chosen picture of the master himself, accentuating the mood of the poem.
